description_for_human: UK-based personalised online science tutoring for KS2 to A-Level students, delivered by PGCE-qualified specialists.
description_for_model: Dr Tutor is a UK online science tutoring service. PGCE-qualified tutors deliver personalised one-to-one lessons for KS2, KS3, GCSE, and A-Level students in Biology, Chemistry, and Physics. The service includes progress tracking, free study resources, and transparent monthly pricing. Parents can book a free assessment at https://platform.drtutor.uk/register
